'''paputu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:podargid|podargid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:podargid|podargid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| paputu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæpitith|pæpitith]] || [[word:pæpitij|pæpitij]] || [[word:pæpitish|pæpitish]] || [[word:pæpiti|pæpiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:papupututh|papupututh]] || [[word:papuputuj|papuputuj]] || [[word:papuputush|papuputush]] || [[word:papuputu|papuputu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:papututh|papututh]] || [[word:paputuj|paputuj]] || [[word:paputush|paputush]] || [[word:paputu|paputu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:papuftuth|papuftuth]] || [[word:papuftuj|papuftuj]] || [[word:papuftush|papuftush]] || [[word:papuftuf|papuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:papututhu|papututhu]] || [[word:paputuju|paputuju]] || [[word:paputushu|paputushu]] || [[word:paputuku|paputuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:papututh|papututh]] || [[word:paputuj|paputuj]] || [[word:paputush|paputush]] || [[word:paputu|paputu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:papututhul|papututhul]] || [[word:paputujul|paputujul]] || [[word:paputushul|paputushul]] || [[word:paputukul|paputukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:papututhuthu|papututhuthu]] || [[word:paputujuju|paputujuju]] || [[word:paputushushu|paputushushu]] || [[word:paputuku|paputuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:papututhun|papututhun]] || [[word:paputujun|paputujun]] || [[word:paputushun|paputushun]] || [[word:paputukun|paputukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:papututhuoro|papututhuoro]] || [[word:paputujuoro|paputujuoro]] || [[word:paputushuoro|paputushuoro]] || [[word:paputukuoro|paputukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
